phase.name: Foundation & Transport
phase.exit_criteria: All message types, error types, transport interface, and internal parsing compile cleanly with go build ./...

tasks.description: Initialize Go module and implement all base types: message types (UserMessage, AssistantMessage, SystemMessage, ResultMessage, TaskStarted, TaskProgress, TaskNotification), content blocks (TextBlock, ThinkingBlock, ToolUseBlock, ToolResultBlock), and typed error hierarchy (CLINotFoundError, ProcessError, JSONDecodeError, MessageParseError)
tasks.commit: feat(types): add message types, content blocks, and error hierarchy
steps: Step 1: Initialize go.mod with module path github.com/johnayoung/claude-agent-sdk-go and Go 1.23 minimum
Step 2: Create agent/ package with all message types as structs implementing a Message interface
Step 3: Create agent/ content block types with a ContentBlock interface and concrete implementations
Step 4: Create agent/ error types as structs implementing error interface, supporting errors.As()
Step 5: Create additional types: RateLimitInfo, ContextUsage, McpServerStatus, AgentDefinition, SandboxConfig
acceptance_criteria: go build ./... succeeds with no errors
All message types implement a common Message interface with Type() method
All content blocks implement a ContentBlock interface
Error types support errors.As() unwrapping with contextual fields

tasks.description: Define public Transport interface and implement default subprocess transport that manages Claude Code CLI via os/exec, communicating over stdin/stdout JSON lines
tasks.commit: feat(transport): add Transport interface and subprocess implementation
steps: Step 1: Create transport/ package with Transport interface (Start, Send, Receive, Close methods)
Step 2: Implement SubprocessTransport using os/exec to launch claude CLI with appropriate flags
Step 3: Implement CLI discovery: search PATH for 'claude' binary, support WithCLIPath override
Step 4: Handle process lifecycle: start, stdin writes, stdout reads, graceful shutdown, context cancellation
acceptance_criteria: Transport interface is exported and documentable
SubprocessTransport discovers CLI in PATH or returns CLINotFoundError
Context cancellation terminates the subprocess cleanly

tasks.description: Implement internal JSON-lines parser that reads newline-delimited JSON from transport and deserializes into typed Message structs using a discriminator field
steps: Step 1: Create internal/parse package with line-by-line JSON reader
Step 2: Implement message type discrimination based on type field in JSON
Step 3: Handle malformed JSON (return JSONDecodeError) and unknown message types gracefully
acceptance_criteria: Parser correctly deserializes all message types from JSON lines
Malformed JSON returns JSONDecodeError with raw line content
Unknown message types are handled without panic (logged or wrapped)
